appliedUpdates.description: Replaced stale Relay-specific testing surface info with org-planner URLs/ports, added concurrency limits, and added Flow Validator Guidance sections for agent-browser and curl.
Corrected repo paths and service commands/healthchecks for org-planner API (3001) and web (5173), removing unrelated Relay/MongoDB docker assumptions.
Added practical agent-browser flow notes from rerun reports (coordinate-based drag fallback and API bootstrap fallback when prompt automation is unreliable).
